name: @univerkit/verso-repo
description: A focused release CLI for JavaScript workspace packages.
author: DreamNum Co., Ltd. <developer@univer.ai>

scripts.check: pnpm run check:rust && pnpm run check:npm
scripts.check:npm: pnpm --filter @univerkit/verso typecheck && pnpm --filter @univerkit/verso test && pnpm run pack:check
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --all
